rationale: Improvement to allow custom files_id for sharding; no spec rule violated, just a missing feature.
Driver sends nToReturn=-1 for OP_GET_MORE with batchSize=1; should send 1 per cursor/wire-protocol spec.
Infinite loop in JsonScanner regex parsing; implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Netty channel type configurability improvement; internal async transport config, no spec area involved.
Javadoc clarification for MaxConnectionIdleTime unit; documentation improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Broken API documentation links; doc typo fix, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
IPv6 address parsing exception; implementation bug in ServerAddress parsing, not a spec rule violation.
Connection and thread leakage in DefaultServerMonitor under network issues; resource leak, no contradicted spec rule.
API ergonomics: driver throws non-MongoException runtime exceptions; API design improvement, not spec conformance.
autoIndexId without capped option; driver API limitation vs. shell behavior, no spec rule referenced.
Suppress deprecation compiler warnings; build/code quality improvement, no spec conformance issue.
OperationIterable missing from Javadocs; documentation issue, no spec area involved.
Async MongoClients ignores readConcern, writeConcern, readPreference from connection string; connection-string spec requires these be applied.
Update maxStaleness implementation to match updated spec tests; syncing driver to revised spec test files.
Missing case for DB_POINTER in switch; internal BSON reader implementation gap, no spec rule about DB_POINTER skip behavior.
Flaky CI test due to executionTimeMillis comparison; test stability fix, not a spec conformance issue.
Legacy BSON API doesn't handle Decimal128; API completeness bug in legacy layer, not a spec rule violation.
GridFSDownloadStream off-by-one error with non-chunk-sized buffer; implementation logic bug, no spec rule defining this behavior.
Driver refuses to reconnect after failover due to stale electionId comparison; SDAM spec defines electionId handling for primary selection.
Threads blocked forever on replica set operations; concurrency/deadlock bug with no identified contradicted spec rule.
MongoClientFactory class missing from packaged jar; build/packaging issue, no spec area involved.
Driver version check fails if another version.properties on classpath; classpath/packaging bug, no spec area.
TLS 1.2 not used on JDK 7; TLS configuration improvement, no spec rule specifies minimum TLS version.
Socket.setKeepAlive called unconditionally; internal socket configuration issue, no spec conformance involved.
Aggregation $group accepts only one id field in API; API limitation vs. server capability, no spec rule violated.
BulkWriteException message broken due to missing toString override; internal API quality bug, not a spec deviation.
Memory leak with Netty 4.1.x async driver; third-party library compatibility issue, no spec rule involved.
BsonBinary doesn't validate UUID length during decode; internal validation inconsistency, no specific BSON spec rule cited.
BsonBinaryWriter error message reports wrong max document size; incorrect error message, internal implementation issue.
LazyBSONObject.entrySet() performance regression 2.x to 3.x; performance bug, no spec rule involved.
ConnectionString.getCredentialList should return immutable list; API safety improvement, no spec conformance issue.
NettyStream misses clean server socket closure; connection handling implementation bug, no contradicted spec rule.
maxTime timeout fires too early on tailable cursors; cursor timeout implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Regression: null filter to DBCollection.find now throws; backward-compatibility API regression, no spec rule involved.
normalization field missing from DBObjectCollationHelper; incomplete collation field mapping; no specific spec rule cited in description.
Can encode but not decode Binary UUID with invalid length; round-trip inconsistency in BSON layer, no spec rule for invalid-length handling.
SocketFactory overridden when ssl=true in URI; internal builder precedence bug, no spec rule about SocketFactory.
Documentation task for new Aggregates methods; pure documentation improvement, no spec conformance involved.
Feature request for post-election callback API; new API feature, no spec rule contradicted.
Server monitor logs too frequently due to lastUpdateTime in equals; logging implementation bug, no spec rule about logging frequency.
NioEventLoopGroup not closed by driver, causing thread/memory leak in Tomcat; resource management improvement, no spec rule.
API design change: disallow 0 maxStaleness; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
DBCollectionFindOptions.cursorType ignored by DBCursor.getQueryObject; legacy API bug, no specific spec rule for cursorType propagation.
ServerAddress(InetAddress) fails for IPv6 without reverse DNS; implementation bug in address parsing, no spec rule violated.
Sends usePowerOf2Sizes field; MongoDB docs say should send flags:1 for create command; direct spec/docs contradiction.
Cursor holds two batches simultaneously; memory inefficiency in cursor implementation, no spec rule about batch memory management.
NPE when null included in WriteRequests list; input validation bug, no spec rule requires null-check behavior.
generateIdIfAbsentFromDocument assumes document mutability; codec API design issue, no spec rule about immutable documents.
Binary subtype output as '0' not '00'; Extended JSON spec requires two-digit padded hex for binary subtype.
OldBinary subtype encodes size twice; driver should throw on mismatch per BSON spec for old binary subtype.
